---
title: "Solar Neutrinos"
lang: en
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="course-index course-subpage">
  <a class="course-back-link" href="../index.html">← All neutrino physics materials</a>

  <section class="course-intro">
    <p class="course-kicker">Mini-course</p>
    <h1>Solar Neutrinos</h1>
    <p>
      A three-session masterclass: from solar fluxes and spectra to MSW,
      a toy Super-Kamiokande-like detector, a pseudoexperiment, and a fit.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="course-accordion" aria-label="Masterclass lessons">
    <details class="course-row" open>
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">01</span>
        <span>Solar Neutrinos: Sources, Reactions, Fluxes</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="slides/01_solar_sources.html">Open slides</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>

    <details class="course-row">
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">02</span>
        <span>MSW Oscillations, Detector, and Pseudoexperiment</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="slides/02_msw_detector_statistics.html">Open slides</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>

    <details class="course-row">
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">03</span>
        <span>Mini-Project Defense</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="slides/03_student_defense.html">Open slides</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>
  </section>

  <section class="course-intro">
    <h2>Working Materials</h2>
    <div class="course-links">
      <a href="data/solar_fluxes_reference.csv">Solar flux table</a>
      <a href="notebooks/01_solar_fluxes_and_spectra.ipynb">Notebook 1</a>
      <a href="notebooks/02_msw_survival_probability.ipynb">Notebook 2</a>
      <a href="notebooks/03_sk_like_detector.ipynb">Notebook 3</a>
      <a href="notebooks/04_pseudoexperiment_and_fit.ipynb">Notebook 4</a>
      <a href="assignments/defense_requirements.html">Defense requirements</a>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
